displayName: Eliza-1 Voice Kokoro — base model + sam preset
purpose: Kokoro-82M TTS base weights and sam voice preset for Eliza-1

files.notes: Sam voice preset. W3-11 fine-tune regressed; this is the best-available preset pending corpus expansion.

notes: W3-11 post-mortem: kokoro sam fine-tune regressed (WER +53%, SpkSim -0.21, UTMOS -34). The sam fine-tune is blocked on quality gate. This repo holds the base kokoro weights plus the best-available voice presets. The primary sam TTS path for production is OmniVoice frozen-conditioning (elizaos/eliza-1-voice-omnivoice). See .swarm/impl/W3-11-kokoro-post-mortem.md.
